title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ASCI International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ASCI International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the ASCI International Enterprises family as a Curriculum Developer in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ASCI International Enterprises:
ASCI International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
